scenarios.setup: Call the active difficulty calculation with deterministic loot chances.
assertions: every documented difficulty band is reachable
boundary classification is monotonic
integer truncation does not collapse fractional bands

scenarios.setup: Create disposable players with no active combat and deterministic balances.
assertions: displayed and deducted reset cost use one formula
the level-100 transition matches the current Tibia rule
all assigned Charms are reset exactly once
relog preserves the reset state

scenarios.setup: Load active Charm definitions and a disposable premium/non-premium character pair.
assertions: all registered IDs and names are unique
each tier exposes matching cost, chance and effect metadata
assignment rejects locked or incompatible states
unlocked tier and assigned race survive relog
single and full reset release the expected slot state
scenarios.cleanup: delete disposable player rows and KV state

scenarios.setup: Exercise kill attribution with a missing/invalid MonsterType in an isolated unit or integration harness.
assertions: no null dereference occurs
no kill counter or Charm Point state changes
the server remains available

scenarios.setup: Select one active monster for each threshold shape and seed kills immediately below each threshold.
assertions: one kill advances exactly one counter
unlock messages and Charm Points fire once at each stage
tracker update matches the saved count
relog restores the exact stage and count

scenarios.setup: Use a disposable DB with an empty boosted_boss table, then start the Bosstiary loader.
assertions: startup does not leave boosted boss uninitialized
a valid fallback row or selected boss is persisted
subsequent loads are idempotent

scenarios.setup: Use disposable Bane, Archfoe and Nemesis bosses with counts around every stage boundary.
assertions: Prowess, Expertise and Mastery thresholds use the correct rarity table
Boss Points are awarded once
slot assignment/removal price and boosted-boss inactivity are correct
loot bonus and slot state survive relog

scenarios.setup: Insert deterministic PvP deaths inside and outside the 70-day window.
assertions: row list contains only in-window entries
page count is computed from the same window
requesting the last page returns the expected bounded rows
no empty phantom pages are advertised

scenarios.setup: Connect the maintained OTClient build to an instrumented disposable Canary world.
assertions: Items request/response parses without unread bytes
Bestiary and Charms requests parse without unread bytes
Bosstiary and boss slots parse without unread bytes
Map action is accepted or explicitly feature-gated
Character/Titles responses parse for every info type
Houses list and auction messages parse without unread bytes
scenarios.cleanup: remove packet captures that contain player identifiers

scenarios.setup: Create disposable available, rented, transfer and move-out houses plus premium/guild eligibility variants.
assertions: only legal actions are accepted for each state
bid/transfer balances are atomic
cancel/accept/reject update owner and state exactly once
house list filters match persisted state
scenarios.cleanup: restore disposable house and account rows
